prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低位次分别为约12147名、17717名、12047名、11907名、12777名。2022年因专业组调整出现异常高位次（17717），剔除异常后近3 年（2023–2025）位次在11907–12777之间波动，2025年基准约12777名，较2024年小幅后移约870名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021–2024年均为7人，2025 年增至11人，2026年进一步扩至14人，较2025年扩招约27%。扩招意味着录取名额增加，对位次有下移（更容易进）的拉力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北师范大学为211工程 、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第44–53名区间，2026年最新排名第48名，属全国师范类院校前列，综合实力强劲；2026年声誉评价为偏正面 ，该校硕士报考热度高（拟招3100人，报考预估破1.5万），教育学领域人气旺盛；抖音热度总排名第67位（一般），但2024年曾达高热（第13位），短视频曝光呈上升趋势；历 史投档异常记录中无该校断档信号，录取走势平稳；第五轮学科评估中，马克思主义理论、教育学、世界史获评A+，统计学获评A，生态学、生物学获评A-，共6 个A-及以上学科，其中3个A+，学科实力在211高校中位居前列，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度2022年曾明显升温（推荐），2023–2024 年转为分化观望，整体平稳偏正面；北京市考生总数从2021年42,037人持续增长至2025年65,434人，2026年预计达84,900人，较2025年增长约29.7%，竞争显著加剧，整体平稳略降；东北师范大学位于吉林长春，属跨省招生；该校在北京市招生占比约0.5%（2021年7人/全 国1367人），占比极小，北京市考生对该校的地域偏好无明显倾向。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12777名、2026年扩招约27%（计划从11人增至14人）对位次的下移拉力 ，以及北京市考生总数暴增约29.7%（从65,434增至84,900人）对位次的上移推力，两者大致抵消但考生增幅略大，叠加学校声誉偏正面、优势学科突出等竞争加剧因素，预计202 6年最低录取位次在2025年基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约14917名，区间14417–15417名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学（师范）、统计学）
- 汉语言文学（师范）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 政治学类（含国际政治、政治学与行政学、行政管理）
- 经济学类（含金融学、会计学、人力资源管理、经济学、市场营销）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术、图书馆学、教育技术学）
- 心理学（师范）
- 教育学类（含教育学、小学教育、学前教育）
- 地理科学类（含地理科学（师范）、地理信息科学、人文地理与城乡规划）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间14417–15417名内，建议以二档专业（政治学类、经济学类）为主攻方向，一档专业（数学类、汉语言文学）作为冲刺，三档专业（计算机类、教育学类等）作为 保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<14417名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>15417名）则应以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Beijing comprehensive subjects were approximately 12147, 17717, 12047, 11907, and 12777 respectively. In 2022, due to adjustments in major groups, an abnormally high ranking (17717) occurred. Excluding this anomaly, the rankings for the recent three years (2023–2025) fluctuated between 11907 and 12777. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 12777, a slight drop of about 870 places compared to 2024. The enrollment plan for this university in Beijing comprehensive subjects: from 2021 to 2024, it was consistently 7 students; in 2025, it increased to 11; and in 2026, it further expanded to 14, an increase of about 27% compared to 2025. Expansion means more admission slots, exerting a downward pull on rankings (easier to get in).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable in the 44–53 range in recent years, with the latest ranking in 2026 at 48th, placing it among the top normal universities nationwide with strong comprehensive strength. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly positive. The university has high popularity for master's applications (planned enrollment of 3100, estimated applications exceeding 15,000), especially in the field of education. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 67th (average), but it reached high popularity in 2024 (13th), showing an upward trend in short video exposure. Historical admission anomaly records show no signs of a cutoff drop for this university, indicating stable admission trends. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Marxist Theory, Education, and World History received A+, Statistics received A, Ecology and Biology received A-, totaling 6 disciplines at A- or above, including 3 A+. The university's disciplinary strength ranks among the top of 211 universities, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher/education majors saw a significant increase in 2022 (recommended), turned to divergence and wait-and-see in 2023–2024, and overall remains stable and slightly positive. The total number of candidates in Beijing has grown continuously from 42,037 in 2021 to 65,434 in 2025, and is expected to reach 84,900 in 2026, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition, with an overall slight decline in stability. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin, and is a cross-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment proportion in Beijing is about 0.5% (7 out of 1367 nationally in 2021), a very small proportion, and Beijing candidates have no obvious regional preference for this university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 12777 in 2025, the downward pull from the enrollment expansion of about 27% in 2026 (plan from 11 to 14 students), and the upward push from the surge in Beijing candidates by about 29.7% (from 65,434 to 84,900), the two roughly offset each other but the candidate increase is slightly larger. Combined with the university's slightly positive reputation and outstanding advantageous disciplines intensifying competition, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14917, with a range of 14417–15417.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Normal), Statistics)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Normal).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Political Science (including International Politics, Political Science and Public Administration, Administrative Management)
- Economics (including Finance, Accounting, Human Resource Management, Economics, Marketing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Library Science, Educational Technology)
- Psychology (Normal)
- Education (including Education, Primary Education, Preschool Education)
- Geographical Sciences (including Geographical Science (Normal), Geographic Information Science, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14417–15417, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Political Science, Economics) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Mathematics, Chinese Language and Literature) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Computer Science, Education, etc.) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<14417), you can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>15417), you should prioritize Tier 3 safety options.
